scripts.build-linux: npm run build && pkg bin/canyon-pkg.cjs --targets node18-linuxstatic-x64 --output out/canyon-linux
scripts.build-aarch64: npm run build && pkg bin/canyon-pkg.cjs --targets node18-linuxstatic-arm64 --output out/canyon-aarch64
scripts.build-macos-x64: npm run build && pkg bin/canyon-pkg.cjs --targets node18-macos-x64 --output out/canyon-macos-x64
scripts.build-macos-arm64: npm run build && pkg bin/canyon-pkg.cjs --targets node18-macos-arm64 --output out/canyon-macos-arm64
scripts.build-alpine: npm run build && pkg bin/canyon-pkg.cjs --targets node18-alpine-x64 --output out/canyon-alpine
scripts.build-windows: npm run build && pkg bin/canyon-pkg.cjs --targets node18-win-x64 --output out/canyon.exe
scripts.do-test: npm run build && node ./bin/canyon.js upload --debug true --scene k1=v2 --scene k2=v3
